calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-16-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Petitioner, Kelly Zambrano-Barrow the Guardian ad litem for the minor present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the oral testimony and evidence presented by the petitioner, the Court waives notice on the minor's father and grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to: Angelica C. Zambrano-Barrow.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-08-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: V.Mack/M. Vallejo, CSR: LaVon Granger
There being no appearances, this matter is ordered off calendar.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-28-2003 Reset To Oct-07-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Patricia M. Evezich #1193.
Petitioner, Elsa Ying Rong Hu present in pro per for the minor, was sworn and examined.
The petitioner fails to provide proof of notice to the minor's father.
This matter is continued to Oct. 6, 2003 at 09:00 am. for the Petitioner to serve the notice on minor's father by mail with proof of service.
